components.value: V, S, M (rare incense and tonics worth 1,000 gp)

description.value: True prognostication functions as divination except that the spell can see up to 100 years into the future. Because of the extreme unpredictability of the far-distant future, true prognostication is incredibly cryptic when used to learn about events on such large a scale.
